title: Savory Flaky Cheese Stir-Fry
description: This savory, flaky Jamaican dish features Monterey Jack cheese and is a perfect lazy Sunday meal, suitable for diabetics.

ingredients.name: Monterey Jack Cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a low-fat variety if needed.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: To taste, or omitted as desired.

instructions: Mix Monterey Jack cheese, vegetable oil, minced garlic, scallions, jerk seasoning, tapioca flour (if using), salt (to taste or omitted), water, and rice flour (if using) in a bowl until well combined.

Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish and bake for 10 minutes on the middle rack of the oven. Alternatively, you can mix all ingredients together thoroughly and spoon them onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper to form thin circles or strips.
Check seasoning and add more salt if needed.
Once done, remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving as desired.
